# Elevate Design System

> SQLI's React component library built with Radix UI primitives, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript.

## Overview

Elevate Design System is a React component library providing themed, accessible components for SQLI applications. It uses Radix UI for interactive primitives, CVA for type-safe variants, and Tailwind CSS for styling.

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install @sqli/elevate-design-system
```

```tsx
import { Button, Badge, Alert } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';
import '@sqli/elevate-design-system/css';

<html data-theme="sqli-light">
  <Button variant="primary">Hello World</Button>
</html>
```

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Components | React 19 + TypeScript |
| Primitives | Radix UI |
| Variants | class-variance-authority (CVA) |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS 4 + CSS variables |
| Build | tsup (ESM + CJS + .d.ts) |
| Icons | hugeicons-react |

## Themes

| Theme | Background | Primary | Usage |
|-------|------------|---------|-------|
| sqli-light | Cream (#FFFAF0) | Cobalt (#1F24E9) | Default |
| sqli-dark | Midnight (#0F0E2B) | Sky (#6DA5FF) | Dark mode |

## Brand Colors

- **Cream**: #FFFAF0 - Light background
- **Midnight**: #0F0E2B - Dark background, text
- **Cobalt**: #1F24E9 - Primary (light mode)
- **Sky**: #6DA5FF - Primary (dark mode)

## Typography

- **Font**: TWK Everett
- **Weights**: Light (300), Regular (400), Medium (500), Bold (700)

## React Components

### Actions

#### Button
```tsx
import { Button } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Button variant="primary">Primary</Button>
<Button variant="secondary">Secondary</Button>
<Button variant="accent">Accent</Button>
<Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
<Button variant="link">Link</Button>
<Button variant="info">Info</Button>
<Button variant="success">Success</Button>
<Button variant="warning">Warning</Button>
<Button variant="error">Error</Button>
<Button size="xs">Extra Small</Button>
<Button size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button size="md">Medium</Button>
<Button size="lg">Large</Button>
<Button loading>Loading</Button>
<Button disabled>Disabled</Button>
<Button block>Full Width</Button>
<Button circle>Circle</Button>
<Button square>Square</Button>
```

#### DropdownMenu (Radix)
```tsx
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild><Button>Menu</Button></DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent>
    <DropdownMenuLabel>Actions</DropdownMenuLabel>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem>Item 1</DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem>Item 2</DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

#### Dialog (Radix, replaces Modal)
```tsx
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogClose } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent size="md">
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Description</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <p>Content</p>
    <DialogClose asChild><Button variant="ghost">Close</Button></DialogClose>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Data Display

#### Badge
```tsx
import { Badge } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Badge variant="primary">Primary</Badge>
<Badge variant="secondary">Secondary</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline">Outline</Badge>
<Badge size="xs">XS</Badge>
<Badge size="lg">LG</Badge>
```

#### Card
```tsx
import { Card, CardBody, CardTitle, CardActions, CardFigure } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Card>
  <CardFigure><img src="image.jpg" alt="Image" /></CardFigure>
  <CardBody>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <p>Description</p>
    <CardActions><Button variant="primary">Action</Button></CardActions>
  </CardBody>
</Card>
```

#### Avatar
```tsx
import { Avatar } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Avatar src="photo.jpg" alt="User" size="lg" shape="circle" />
<Avatar alt="JD" fallback={<span>JD</span>} size="md" />
```

#### Accordion (Radix)
```tsx
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>Section 1</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Content 1</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

#### Tooltip (Radix)
```tsx
import { TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip>
    <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Hover me</Button></TooltipTrigger>
    <TooltipContent side="top">Tooltip text</TooltipContent>
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

#### Kbd
```tsx
import { Kbd } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Kbd size="md">Ctrl</Kbd> + <Kbd size="md">C</Kbd>
```

#### Loading
```tsx
import { Loading } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Loading size="md" variant="primary" />
```

#### Skeleton
```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Skeleton className="h-32 w-32" />
<Skeleton className="h-4 w-full" />
```

#### Progress
```tsx
import { Progress } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Progress value={70} max={100} variant="primary" size="md" />
```

#### Divider
```tsx
import { Divider } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Divider>OR</Divider>
<Divider orientation="vertical">OR</Divider>
```

### Data Input

#### Input
```tsx
import { Input } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Input variant="bordered" placeholder="Type here" />
<Input variant="ghost" inputSize="lg" />
```

#### Textarea
```tsx
import { Textarea } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Textarea variant="bordered" placeholder="Message" />
```

#### Select (Radix)
```tsx
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectValue } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Select>
  <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Pick one" /></SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="1">Option 1</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="2">Option 2</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

#### Checkbox (Radix)
```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Checkbox />
<Checkbox defaultChecked />
```

#### RadioGroup (Radix)
```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';
import { Label } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<RadioGroup defaultValue="option1">
  <RadioGroupItem value="option1" id="r1" />
  <Label htmlFor="r1">Option 1</Label>
  <RadioGroupItem value="option2" id="r2" />
  <Label htmlFor="r2">Option 2</Label>
</RadioGroup>
```

#### Switch (Radix)
```tsx
import { Switch } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Switch />
<Switch defaultChecked />
```

#### Slider (Radix)
```tsx
import { Slider } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Slider defaultValue={[50]} max={100} step={1} />
```

#### Label (Radix)
```tsx
import { Label } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
```

### Feedback

#### Alert
```tsx
import { Alert } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Alert variant="info">Info</Alert>
<Alert variant="success">Success</Alert>
<Alert variant="warning">Warning</Alert>
<Alert variant="error">Error</Alert>
```

#### Toast (Radix)
```tsx
import { ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast, ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastAction, ToastClose } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<ToastProvider>
  <Toast variant="success">
    <ToastTitle>Saved</ToastTitle>
    <ToastDescription>Your changes have been saved.</ToastDescription>
    <ToastClose />
  </Toast>
  <ToastViewport />
</ToastProvider>
```

### Navigation

#### Tabs (Radix)
```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system';

<Tabs defaultValue="tab1">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="tab1">Tab 1</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="tab2">Tab 2</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="tab1">Content 1</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="tab2">Content 2</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

### Charts (Recharts)
```tsx
import { sqliColors, sqliChartTheme, defaultAxisProps, defaultTooltipProps } from '@sqli/elevate-design-system/charts';
import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts';

<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
  <BarChart data={data}>
    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" />
    <XAxis dataKey="name" {...defaultAxisProps.light} />
    <YAxis {...defaultAxisProps.light} />
    <Tooltip {...defaultTooltipProps.light} />
    <Bar dataKey="value" fill={sqliColors.cobalt} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
  </BarChart>
</ResponsiveContainer>
```

### Icons
```tsx
import { Home01Icon, Search01Icon } from 'hugeicons-react';

<Button variant="primary">
  <Home01Icon size={20} /> Home
</Button>
```

## CSS Variables

```css
/* Available in both themes */
--color-base-100     /* Background */
--color-base-200     /* Slightly darker background */
--color-base-300     /* Border/accent background */
--color-base-content /* Text color */
--color-primary      /* Primary color */
--color-primary-content
--color-secondary    /* Secondary color */
--color-secondary-content
--color-accent       /* Accent color */
--color-accent-content
--color-info, --color-success, --color-warning, --color-error
--color-border       /* Border color */
--radius-sm, --radius-md, --radius-lg, --radius-full
```

## Theme Switching
```tsx
// Set theme via data attribute
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'sqli-dark');

// Or scope to a container
<div data-theme="sqli-dark">Dark content</div>
```

## Distribution

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| dist/index.js | ESM components (~38 KB) |
| dist/index.cjs | CJS components (~41 KB) |
| dist/index.d.ts | TypeScript declarations (~17 KB) |
| dist/sqli-design-system.css | Full CSS |
| dist/sqli-design-system.min.css | Minified CSS |
| dist/tokens.css | CSS variables only |
| dist/fonts.css | Font declarations |
| dist/fonts/ | TWK Everett font files |
| dist/logos/ | SQLI logos (SVG & PNG) |

## Resources

- Repository: https://gitlab-paris.sqli.com/SQLI/elevate-design-system

## SQLI Brand Guidelines

- Logo "sqli" always lowercase
- In text, write "SQLI" uppercase
- Promise: "Elevate. Digitally" (period only after "Elevate")
